hooks.command: git diff --cached --name-only -- 'docs/verification/**/*.md' | xargs -I{} aec run-script playwright-test-generator sync-tests.js --changed-doc {} && aec run-script playwright-test-generator preflight.sh
hooks.description: Before commit, check staged verification docs for changes. For each changed doc, sync/regenerate playwright tests. Then run preflight to ensure all tests pass.
After verification doc changes, check if playwright tests need regeneration.
